RULING - THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF BA BOTTOM LINE, LLC's Motion To Compel Further Responses Of Terry Van Bibber And Safedocs To Special Interrogatories, And For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $10,372.50 - Plaintiff BA BOTTOM LINE, LLC's Motion to Compel Further Responses of Terry Van Bibber and Safedocs to Special Interrogatories is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Defendant Terry Van Bibber is ORDERED to provide complete and verified supplemental responses to Special Interrogatories 1-19, including 3(a) providing information dating back to January 2, 2011 where time frames are specified in the requests. Defendant Safedocs, Inc. is ORDERED to provide complete and verified supplemental responses to Special Interrogatories 6,7,9,10,11,17 and 19 providing information dating back to January 2, 2011 where time frames are specified in the requests. Plaintiff's request for sanctions in the amount of $10,372.50 is GRANTED, but reduced to $1,750.00 to be paid jointly by Defendants Terry Van Bibber and Safedocs, Inc. to Plaintiff BA BOTTOM LINE, LLC. The verified supplemental responses and payment of sanctions must be served and payment in the form of a certified check within 15 days of service of Notice of Entry of the Order on the motion. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro tem: Peter Van Zandt, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not Reported. =(302/JPT)
